caption: 这个月又开新分期。
scene: Andy sitting cross-legged on the sofa staring at a phone screen showing a small calendar grid with tiny dots on multiple dates, a single shopping bag on the floor beside him, one paw rubbing the back of his neck.
bible_hook: §3 Andy has 14 active 花呗 installment plans, lives paycheck-to-paycheck
rationale: Recent posts have leaned tender/cozy; this anchors to Andy's specific money texture (installment plans) which hasn't been shown directly, and it's a solo after several 'both' posts. Differs from 05-18 NEW DROP which was about the decision moment — this is the aftermath.
